evidence: README.md states the product mission, current evidence, and explicit transaction-backed execution gap.
AGENTS.md, contracts/README.md, and contracts/authority-lifecycle.md define authority ownership and lifecycle gates.
docs/architecture/ARCHITECTURE.md and docs/architecture/REPO_BOUNDARIES.md separate contracts, core, adapters, dashboard, and provider evidence.
docs/repo-truth/THC_IN_THIS_REPO.md now records the THC-BOT local artifact boundary.
missingEvidence: Some externally hosted/live-provider evidence still depends on operator-held credentials or provider dashboards for fresh replay.
categories.notes: Truth boundaries are strong and current. The main reduction is live evidence freshness outside a deterministic local checkout.

evidence: npm run check passed on reviewed revision 52d0966, covering scaffold validation, contract validation, center CLI validation, credential safety, focused contract tests, all tests, and typecheck.
tests/ covers contracts, core fail-closed behavior, ENS identity, 0G memory, KeeperHub adapter, signer adapter, center CLI, and web surfaces.
scripts/check-credential-safety.ts reports live-secret readiness without printing secrets and keeps live writes gated.
contracts/examples/invalid-*.json and validation scripts prove important negative cases.
missingEvidence: Transaction-backed KeeperHub or executor receipt remains absent.
Wallet-rendered signing and hardware secure-display evidence remain deferred.
Live provider replay requires external configuration and cannot be fully reproduced from public files alone.
categories.notes: Hardening is broad and automated locally, with explicit fail-closed authority posture. Remaining gaps are live execution and wallet evidence, not local validation coverage.

evidence: README.md, docs/README.md, docs/agents/START_HERE.md, ROADMAP.md, and docs/roadmaps/CURRENT_STATE_AND_NEXT.md route humans and agents to current state and next actions.
skills/README.md and repo-local skills provide repeatable operating lanes for contracts, adapters, setup, credentials, transactions, and THC checks.
Provider and wallet docs distinguish local fixture, live-bound, workflow-execution, and unproven claim levels.
docs/thc/ now gives public reviewers a stable first inspection path.
missingEvidence: The repo contains substantial phase history; a new reviewer still has to follow several index files to separate current proof from deferred scope.
Some dashboard/operator recovery paths remain distributed across provider, roadmap, and skill docs.
categories.notes: Clarity is high for an authority system of this size, but the evidence volume still imposes navigation cost.

evidence: CHANGELOG.md, DECISIONS.md, docs/decisions/, and docs/audits/ preserve detailed phase and provider evidence history.
docs/thc/LOCAL_CHECK.md and this THC-BOT run provide local review artifacts for the current methodology revision.
missingEvidence: No independent public, peer, or Vel Labs reviewed THC artifact is recorded for this revision.
Structured THC-BOT history starts with this new run, so trend evidence is not mature yet.
categories.notes: Audit history is extensive, but independent review history and multi-run THC-BOT trend history are still limited.
